purpose: Second real historical SPY Ideal replay v1 fixture. This fixture copies validated 1H RTH source OHLCV rows and covers signal/stage/lifecycle shape only; it excludes trade outcomes, option economics, account sizing, broker execution, live trade decisions, and auto-trading.
boundary_notes: Each fixture row includes only validated SPY source candles available at or before that row timestamp.
OHLCV values are copied from the validated source CSV without edits or fabricated market data.
Macro, IV, event, and 24H context fields remain unconfirmed because the source CSV does not provide confirmed context values.
Expected output rows are signal/stage/lifecycle assertions only, not live trade instructions or execution recommendations.
This fixture does not include P&L, option contract economics, account sizing, trade outcome, broker/order/execution content, or auto-trading behavior.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Rows through this timestamp show the selected window advancing from the 2026-05-06 open into a 740.75 high; no later pullback/retest rows are used.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH second-real SPY Ideal replay row: watching_ideal_impulse_context.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: watch SPY Ideal impulse context for a later pullback/retest; this is not a live trade instruction or execution recommendation.
